message:
feat: Wire up metal0 internal modules for @logic_table benchmark

- Add all metal0 internal modules to build.zig (runtime, collections,
  c_interop, json, gzip, h2, regex, bigint, ds, glob, tokenizer, pkg,
  analysis, debug, codegen modules)
- Fix Zig 0.15 ArrayList API compatibility in metal0/src/api.zig by
  using std.array_list.Managed instead of std.ArrayList
- Fix pointer alignment cast in bench_logic_table.zig for Zig 0.15
- Enable @logic_table benchmark to run in CI

files.patch:
@@ -147,7 +147,7 @@ fn jitCompile(allocator: std.mem.Allocator) !struct { ctx: codegen.JitContext, f
 
     // Get the function pointer if available
     const fn_ptr: ?*const fn ([*]f64, [*]f64, usize) callconv(.c) f64 = if (compiled.ptr) |ptr|
-        @ptrCast(ptr)
+        @ptrCast(@alignCast(ptr))
     else
         null;
